meaning: n.大理石,(玩具)弹球.石弹子,雕刻品;adj.大理石的,冷酷无情的,坚硬的
examples: Her heels clacked on the marble floor.
Marble Arch is a famous London landmark.
Behind the hall, a 17m marble carriageway carved with dragons leads up to the entrance.
Once you have been shepherded into the hamam you will be left to lounge on the heated marble.
